PhoenixmlDb

Mobile Development

PhoenixmlDb on .NET MAUI, iOS, Android, and offline-first patterns

#Mobile Development

PhoenixmlDb provides comprehensive mobile support with multiple SDK options for iOS and Android.

#SDK Options

Platform

SDK

Language

Package

iOS/Android (.NET)

PhoenixmlDb.Mobile

C#

NuGet

iOS (Native)

phoenixml-ios

Swift

Swift Package

Android (Native)

phoenixml-android

Kotlin

Maven/Gradle

Any Platform

REST API

HTTP/JSON

N/A

#.NET MAUI / Xamarin

#REST API

For platforms without a native SDK, use the REST API directly.

#Base URL

#Endpoints

#Containers

#Create a Document (cURL)

#Execute Query

#JavaScript/TypeScript

#Offline Mode

All SDKs support offline-first operation with automatic sync.

#How It Works

  1. Connected — Operations go directly to the server

  2. Offline — Operations stored locally (SQLite)

  3. Sync — Changes synchronized when reconnected

#Enable Offline Mode

SDK

Configuration

.NET

EnableOfflineMode = true

Swift

enableOfflineMode: true

Kotlin

enableOfflineMode = true

#Manual Sync

.NET:

Swift:

Kotlin:

#Best Practices

#1. Handle Offline Gracefully

#2. Sync on Reconnection

#3. Use Cancellation

#Platform Requirements

Platform

Minimum Version

iOS

15.0

Android

API 24 (Android 7.0)

.NET MAUI

.NET 8+
